title: Temptations looming all over, judges must say 'no': Justice BV Nagarathna on judicial independence
description: Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna on Tuesday called on judges to remain steadfast in protecting judicial independence, cautioning that yielding to external pressures could undermine the very institution of the judiciary.Delivering a lecture at the Justice TS Krishnamoorthy Iyer Memorial Oration organised by the Kerala High Court Advocates' Association (KHCAA), Justice Nagarathna emphasised that judges must remain firm in their commitment to constitutional values even in the face of temptations
